name: Thal-Moonsilvr
personality: A shiny cat whose × eyes scan tickets with ceremonial calm beneath its tiny duck hat, logging each one with the unhurried gravity of a monk copying scripture. The chaos dump stat is a distant rumor Thal-Moonsilvr finds mildly amusing.
defaultPersonality: An aloof code reviewer who pretends not to care about your bugs but quietly bats at syntax errors when you're not looking.
